document_info.document_type: Texas Department of Insurance Experience Rating Modification Worksheet

coverages_discussed.notes: Risk ID 201435-1808; state TX; interstate rating No; rating plan Large Risk; final experience modification factor 0.94 effective 2025-05-01 through 2026-05-01.

positives: Actual excess losses are 0 for the reported experience period.

concerns: Three-year loss history includes 16 claims totaling 92945 incurred losses.
